payment-methods.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
payment-methods.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, and Troy cards. Mobile wallet support is coming soon.

refunds.question: When is the deposit fee refunded?
refunds.answer: For per-minute rentals, the deposit is refunded the same day after the rental ends if there are no penalties.

security.question: Is my payment information secure?
security.answer: Your card details are encrypted with SSL and processed securely through our payment provider.

invoice.question: Where can I see invoice details?
invoice.answer: An invoice is emailed after payment. You can also view payment history in your profile.

ownerPayout.title: Payment & Payout Settings
ownerPayout.subtitle: Complete your details so rental earnings can be transferred to your bank account.
ownerPayout.inactiveWarning: Rental earnings cannot be transferred until your profile is complete. After platform commission, the remaining amount is deposited to your IBAN.
ownerPayout.formDesc: Your legal name, national ID, and IBAN are used for iyzico sub-merchant registration.
